base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of hud_score_digits — a ui (hud_readout) from 1986 castlevania. HUD 0-9 digits — white, rendered in score/stage/hearts readouts. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
